title: EnvironmentZ + The Aether Compat
description: A compatibility between EnvironmentZ and The Aether that makes the weather a lot colder as you would probably expect at higher altitudes.
body: A compatibility between [EnvironmentZ](https://modrinth.com/mod/environmentz) and [The Aether](https://modrinth.com/mod/aether) that makes the weather a lot colder as you would probably expect at higher altitudes. This datapack also adds compatibility to some of The Aethers blocks allowing them to have sources of heat.
